sections.content: Let me check the block state. The agent is white, and I just SPACE'd. The block should now be all white (top 5 rows were purple, now stamped white).

sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
ascii_lines = current_frame.ascii.split('\n')
print("Block area (rows 33-44, cols 26-38):")
for i, line in enumerate(ascii_lines[33:44]):
    print(f"  row {33+i}: {line[26:38]}")

# Check agent color
seg = current_frame.segmentation
for node in seg['nodes']:
    if node['pixels'] >= 80 and node['pixels'] <= 90:
        print(f"\nAgent: color={node['color']}, pixels={node['pixels']}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>

Let me try rotating the agent and see if SPACE affects a different part of the block.
